sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n29065" key="du/sqeros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δύσ-θερος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n29065.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">over-hot, parched</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:5:110" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.110</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
